corpus.title: BM25
corpus.text: BM25 is a classical sparse retrieval algorithm that ranks documents by term frequency and inverse document frequency.

corpus.title: Dense Passage Retrieval
corpus.text: Dense passage retrieval uses neural text embeddings to represent queries and documents in a shared vector space for semantic search.

corpus.title: BEIR
corpus.text: BEIR is a heterogeneous benchmark for evaluating zero-shot information retrieval across diverse domains.

corpus.title: Contrastive Retrieval
corpus.text: Dense retrieval methods trained with contrastive learning outperform sparse methods on many semantic similarity tasks.

corpus.title: MTEB
corpus.text: The MTEB benchmark evaluates text embedding models across classification, clustering, retrieval, and semantic textual similarity tasks.
